title: Trial Chamber Generation Adjustment: The End
description: This is a data pack that changes the generation of the vanilla Trial Chambers from the Overworld to the End dimension, while also slightly reducing their spawn probability.(Due to the unique terrain of the End, the generation needs to be more spread out.)
body:
This is a data pack that changes the generation of the vanilla Trial Chambers from the Overworld to the End dimension, while also slightly reducing their spawn probability.(Due to the unique terrain of the End, the generation needs to be more spread out.)

这是一个数据包，作用是将原版试炼密室的生成由主世界更改为末地，并且稍微下降了一点生成概率(因为末地地形的缘故，所以要分散一些)
